  "q1": {
    "verdict": "MALICIOUS",
    "explanation": "The sample exhibits multiple severe malicious behaviors including keylogging (polling), screen capture, C2 communication (HTTP requests, receiving/sending data), process termination, and registry manipulation. It is packed with UPX and uses XOR encoding for evasion, confirming its malicious intent."
  },
  "q2": {
    "family": ["Spyware", "Backdoor"],
    "explanation": "The primary functionality involves collecting user data via keylogging and screen capture, classifying it as Spyware. The presence of C2 communication channels (receiving data, sending data) and the ability to terminate processes indicates a Backdoor capability."
